title: Bee Removal in Floral Park, Queens | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Floral Park, Queens. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Floral Park's tree-lined streets and charming residential properties provide an ideal habitat for bees, especially during spring and summer months. When bee colonies establish themselves in your home's eaves, walls, or yard, professional removal becomes essential for your family's safety. Best Pest Control NYC offers expert bee removal services throughout Floral Park, ensuring safe and humane relocation of these important pollinators.
whyUs: Our certified technicians serve Floral Park with over 15 years of experience in safe bee removal and exclusion services. We use humane methods that protect both your property and the local ecosystem, with same-day emergency service available for active bee threats.
localContext: Floral Park's proximity to Queens landmarks like Belmont Park and its abundance of mature trees and gardens make it particularly attractive to honeybees and carpenter bees. The neighborhood's mix of Tudor-style homes and vintage properties often feature the wall voids and wooden structures where bee colonies commonly nest.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day bee removal service in Floral Park for emergency situations. Most bee removals are completed within 2-4 hours, depending on colony size and location. We'll assess your situation immediately and provide a clear timeline during our initial inspection.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 bee removal price?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe removal of the colony, hive extraction when accessible, treatment of the affected area, and initial exclusion work to prevent re-entry. The final price depends on colony size, location accessibility, and whether structural work is needed to access the hive.

faqs.question: Do you relocate the bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation, working with local beekeepers to rehome honeybee colonies. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't feasible for safety reasons, we use targeted treatments. We'll discuss the best approach for your specific situation in Floral Park.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: We provide exclusion services to seal entry points and remove pheromone traces that attract new colonies. Our bee removal includes recommendations for preventing future infestations, and we offer follow-up inspections to ensure your Floral Park property remains bee-free. A warranty is included with our complete removal service.
